archetype: 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast). A premium, dark 'Old Money Tech' aesthetic for serious e-commerce sellers.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black text-white

layout_spacing.general_philosophy: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-12 for containers. Let the dark space breathe to create tension and luxury.
layout_spacing.bento_marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix wide (col-span-8) and tall (col-span-4 row-span-2) shapes for asymmetry.
layout_spacing.bento_dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dense, edge-to-edge alignment for 'control room' utility.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10. Must be sticky with z-50.
surface_strategies.cards_default: Flat background (#121214), 1px solid border (rgba(255,255,255,0.08)). No shadow in resting state.
surface_strategies.premium_pricing_card: Tracing Beam layout: Use a glowing border gradient (emerald to amber) with a soft blur behind it to indicate the £39/mo tier.

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-500 text-white font-bold tracking-wide rounded-md hover:bg-emerald-400 transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-300 hover:text-white hover:border-white transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500 rounded-md backdrop-blur-sm text-white
components.tags: bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-bold

images.description: Abstract dark cinematic background with emerald and gold volumetric light leaks. Use as an absolute positioned background in the Hero section with 30-40% opacity and object-cover.
Macro close up of glowing translucent glass cube with shopping bag icon. Feature this image in the 'Product Validator' section as the primary visual.
Abstract 3D floating luminous green charts. Use as a background graphic or side-panel image for the 'Profit Simulator' interactive widget.
Dashboard analytics charts. Use in the 'Competitor Intelligence' or 'Product Scoring' feature blocks.

hero_validator.design: Center-aligned massive heading. Instead of a standard CTA, place a massive 'Product Validator' search input dead center. Glowing border when focused. Button inside the input field.
hero_validator.emotion: Action-oriented, magical tool right at the start.

profit_simulator.design: Split layout. Left: Shadcn sliders (Cost, Price, Ad Spend) with emerald accent colors. Right: A massive 'Net Profit' number (text-6xl text-emerald-400 font-black) that updates. Background uses 'profit_simulator_bg' at low opacity.

one_click_launch.design: A bento card showcasing 'One-Click Launch'. Feature mockups of Ad Copy blocks, and Shopify/WooCommerce export buttons.

product_scoring_dashboard.design: Strict grid 'Control Room' style. Use donut charts for 'Launch Score' (Out of 100). Use colors to map score (Emerald > 80, Amber > 60).

supplier_competitor_intel.design: List views with tight density. Tabbed interface (Shadcn Tabs) to switch between 'CJ Dropshipping Suppliers' and 'Competitor Ads'.

pricing_page.design: 3 columns. Core (£19/mo), Premium (£39/mo), Enterprise (£99/mo). The £39/mo tier must be scaled up (scale-105), feature a glowing border, an 'Emerald' primary button, and an 'OVER 80% CHOOSE THIS' overline.

tech_stack_instructions.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone style). Install command: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
tech_stack_instructions.motion: Use framer-motion for staggering bento grid items on scroll. Keep animations fast and snappy (0.2s duration, ease-out). Install command: yarn add framer-motion
tech_stack_instructions.data_viz: Use recharts for scoring/profit trends. Install command: yarn add recharts
tech_stack_instructions.components: Heavily customize shadcn/ui. Remove border-radius on elements if going for a sharper look, or keep it subtle (rounded-md). Enforce dark mode globally.

testing_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, sliders, simulator outputs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.
